content:
Query: Create a boids simulation in plain html and javascript. Render hundreds of fast moving and colorful boids on a 2D canvas. Split each component into separate files. Verify each component after they are written. The main runnable interface should be in `index.html`. Make sure to save all components within ONLY this directory: `./output/boids-simulation/`.


Respond with exactly one ```repl``` code block.

reply:
```repl
# Plan:
# - Spawn one child per file to write the requested components into ./output/boids-simulation/
# - Children will write their file and return a short confirmation.
# - After waiting for children, verify presence and some expected contents in each file.
contract = """
Project: Boids simulation split into files. Write files under ./output/boids-simulation/ exactly.

Files to produce (each child writes its assigned file path):
1) ./output/boids-simulation/index.html
   - Minimal, runnable HTML page.
   - Include <canvas id="canvas"></canvas>.
   - Link to "styles.css" and load "script.js" as an ES module: <script type="module" src="./script.js"></script>.
   - Provide small UI: play/pause button, slider for boid count, and FPS / count display area (can be simple).
   - Title: "Boids Simulation".

2) ./output/boids-simulation/styles.css
   - Styles for body, canvas (full-window), and simple controls panel.

3) ./output/boids-simulation/util.js
   - Export utility functions for 2D vectors and helpers:
     - export function vec(x,y), add, sub, mul, div, mag, normalize, limit, dist2, randRange, clamp, hueColor(h)
   - Keep code concise and well-commented for clarity.

4) ./output/boids-simulation/boid.js
   - Export a Boid class: export class Boid { constructor(...); update(); applyForce(); edges(); align(); cohesion(); separation(); flock(boids); draw(ctx); }
   - Implement common boids rules with tunable parameters (perception radii, weights, maxSpeed, maxForce).
   - Color each boid using HSL; colors can vary by hue or speed for a colorful result.

5) ./output/boids-simulation/script.js
   - type=module entry module that imports {Boid} from './boid.js' and helpers from './util.js'.
   - Create hundreds of boids (default ~400), set them moving fast.
   - Resize canvas to window size, animate using requestAnimationFrame.
   - Hook up UI: play/pause, boid count slider that respawns to new count, update FPS and count displays.
   - Use efficient loop but plain O(n^2) neighbor checks are acceptable for this task.

Shared invariants:
 - All files must live only under ./output/boids-simulation/
 - index.html must reference styles.css and script.js relative to its location.
 - script.js must be a module and import boid.js and util.js using relative paths.
 - util.js and boid.js must use ES module exports (export ...).

Child instruction: read this CONTRACT and write the assigned file path with final content. Return exactly a short confirmation string like "WROTE <path>".
"""

handles = [
    delegate("index.html", "Write the index.html file per the contract.", contract),
    delegate("styles.css", "Write the styles.css file per the contract.", contract),
    delegate("util.js", "Write the util.js file per the contract.", contract),
    delegate("boid.js", "Write the boid.js file per the contract.", contract),
    delegate("script.js", "Write the script.js file per the contract.", contract),
]
results = yield wait(*handles)
# results is a list of children return values (short confirmations). Now verify files were created and contain expected snippets.

# Verification checks:
paths = [
    "./output/boids-simulation/index.html",
    "./output/boids-simulation/styles.css",
    "./output/boids-simulation/util.js",
    "./output/boids-simulation/boid.js",
    "./output/boids-simulation/script.js",
]

# Basic existence and content checks
for p in paths:
    content = read_file(p)
    assert len(content) > 20, f"{p} seems too small or empty"

# Check index.html has canvas, stylesheet link, and module script tag
idx = read_file(paths[0])
assert "<canvas" in idx and "id=\"canvas\"" in idx, "index.html must contain a canvas with id=\"canvas\""
assert "rel=\"stylesheet\"" in idx and "styles.css" in idx, "index.html must link styles.css"
assert "type=\"module\"" in idx and "script.js" in idx, "index.html must load script.js as module"

# Check util.js exports
util = read_file(paths[2])
assert "export" in util and "vec" in util, "util.js should export functions (e.g., vec)"

# Check boid.js exports Boid and references flock/align/cohesion/separation
boid = read_file(paths[3])
assert "export class Boid" in boid or "export default class Boid" in boid, "boid.js must export Boid class"
for token in ("flock(", "align(", "cohesion(", "separation(", "draw("):
    assert token in boid, f"boid.js should implement {token}"

# Check script.js imports and creates many boids and sets up animation loop
script = read_file(paths[4])
assert "import" in script and "from './boid.js'" in script, "script.js must import Boid from ./boid.js"
assert "requestAnimationFrame" in script, "script.js must use requestAnimationFrame for animation"
assert "boids" in script and "new Boid" in script, "script.js should create Boid instances"

# Basic sanity: number of files created
created = len([p for p in paths if read_file(p)])
assert created == 5, f"Expected 5 files created, found {created}"

done("Wrote and verified 5 files in ./output/boids-simulation/: index.html, styles.css, util.js, boid.js, script.js")
```

   - Implement common boids rules with tunable parameters (perception radii, weights, maxSpeed, maxForce).

    "./output/boids-simulation/script.js",
]

# Basic existence and content checks
for p in paths:
    content = read_file(p)
    assert len(content) > 20, f"{p} seems too small or empty"

# Check index.html has canvas, stylesheet link, and module script tag
idx = read_file(paths[0])
assert "<canvas" in idx and "id=\"canvas\"" in idx, "index.html must contain a canvas with id=\"canvas\""
assert "rel=\"stylesheet\"" in idx and "styles.css" in idx, "index.html must link styles.css"
assert "type=\"module\"" in idx and "script.js" in idx, "index.html must load script.js as module"

# Check util.js exports
util = read_file(paths[2])
assert "export" in util and "vec" in util, "util.js should export functions (e.g., vec)"

# Check boid.js exports Boid and references flock/align/cohesion/separation
boid = read_file(paths[3])
assert "export class Boid" in boid or "export default class Boid" in boid, "boid.js must export Boid class"
for token in ("flock(", "align(", "cohesion(", "separation(", "draw("):
    assert token in boid, f"boid.js should implement {token}"

# Check script.js imports and creates many boids and sets up animation loop
script = read_file(paths[4])
assert "import" in script and "from './boid.js'" in script, "script.js must import Boid from ./boid.js"
assert "requestAnimationFrame" in script, "script.js must use requestAnimationFrame for animation"
assert "boids" in script and "new Boid" in script, "script.js should create Boid instances"

# Basic sanity: number of files created
created = len([p for p in paths if read_file(p)])
assert created == 5, f"Expected 5 files created, found {created}"

done("Wrote and verified 5 files in ./output/boids-simulation/: index.html, styles.css, util.js, boid.js, script.js")
